title: Analytics - Find My Device Sound Played
scenario: Find My Device sound playback event is not logged in Firebase after triggering from the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Find My Device Firebase page and verify it contains default elements and the Device PID.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
4. Tap on the connected device to open Device Settings.
5. Go to the Find My Device tab.
6. Select the connected device from the list.
7. Tap the button to trigger the sound on the device.
8. Wait for some time (usually a few hours) for event logging to propagate.
9. Return to the Find My Device Firebase page and check the event count for related elements.
expected: The event count for related elements on the Find My Device Firebase page should increase after triggering the sound on the device.
